title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Safestyle Roofing and Driveways Limited
body: "Application number 5516  Applicant Ashi Group Limited objected to the name used by Safestyle Roofing and Driveways Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
